creator: alex@cichlids.com
text:
This summarizes the ispell dictionary-ports.

_It obsoletes textproc/br-ispell and PR 14716!_

It adds new dictionaries for German (new and old orthography).
You can chosse which languages you want to install.

This is an interactive port.

I see textproc/ispell-dictionaries as directory, but you might want to change this

I attach this as a UUencoded tar.gz, because there are special characters (^G)
in the files, and maybe they're destroyed while I send this.

It will be no problem to add other languages to this port later.
